Drawing Interchange File Format (ASCII) R13: Modified signature to account for UNIX line endings. It will likely be necessary to make similar changes for other DXF ASCII files. Please contact the PRONOM team if you have any currently unidentified DXF files. New signature and samples provided by Henk Vanstappen, Datable.

Drawing Interchange File Format (ASCII) R14: Modified signature to account for UNIX line endings. It will likely be necessary to make similar changes for other DXF ASCII files. Please contact the PRONOM team if you have any currently unidentified DXF files. New signature and samples provided by Henk Vanstappen, Datable.

Drawing Interchange File Format (ASCII) 2000-2002: Modified signature to account for UNIX line endings. It will likely be necessary to make similar changes for other DXF ASCII files.
